title: Schema with @schema_prefix for tenant isolation
prompt: Build MyApp.Tenants.Product in a multi-tenant app where each tenant has its own Postgres schema. Use `@schema_prefix "tenant_data"` at the module level. Fields: name, sku, price (decimal). Write to lib/my_app/tenants/product.ex.
tier_rationale: Module-level attribute + decimal type. Medium because the @schema_prefix placement is the detail.
